text: Repeating the phrase, 'I'm a great guy,' reverberates within me with hints of self-assurance and longing for validation. Surrounded by the sleek, modern environment of what appears to be an innovation or research space, I'm prompted to consider the construction of self-esteem in the context of achievement and technological progress. My own presence here feels somewhat small, perhaps insecure, dwarfed by the ambition written on the walls and the glowing screens that seem to silently demand greatness.
